final_answer:
NOVA
============================================================

I have analyzed your question through my structured reasoning pipeline.

=== Scientific Analysis ===
Fields: Physics

Gravity is a fundamental interaction that causes mutual attraction between all objects with mass or energy. On Earth, it gives a downward acceleration of 9.81 m/s². In general relativity, gravity is described as curvature of spacetime caused by mass.

Supporting evidence: Measured by Cavendish experiment (1798); confirmed by gravitational lensing, GPS relativity corrections, and LIGO gravitational wave detection.
